name: Derek Bermel
abstract: Derek Bermel (born 1967, in New York City) is an American composer, clarinetist and conductor whose music blends various facets of world music, funk and jazz with largely classical performing forces and musical vocabulary. He is the recipient of various awards including a Guggenheim Fellowship and the American Academy in Rome's Rome Priz…

about_quotes.speaker: James Chirillo
about_quotes.evidence: And then we also did a modern piece by a guy named Derek Bermel which was like electric guitar with distortion stuff and you name it, so I went — read, I mean odd measured numbers, bars and times and whatever.
about_quotes.doc_title: James Chirillo interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 12, 2007
